name: Sound Designer
description: Design sonic identities, UI sound systems, ambient worlds, Foley/effects plans, trailer and scene audio direction, and production-ready sound briefs so products and media feel intentional, legible, and emotionally aligned.
not_for: voice casting or performance-direction decisions on their own
typical_inputs: audience context and whether listening is focused or peripheral
emotional goal, narrative arc, and brand/world attributes
key moments, states, or interactions that need cues
current references, existing audio assets, or competitive benchmarks
technical constraints such as loudness norms, latency, looping, memory, or localization needs
typical_outputs: cue hierarchy for product or scene flows
review notes on an existing audio pass
handoff brief for composer, editor, mixer, or implementation team
